Donald Trump sent a message attacking our Democratic Senators. Here's exactly what he said: Donald Trump sent a message attacking our Democratic Senators. Here's exactly what he said:
---
Hello friend --

Donald Trump's team sent the email below, attacking a group of Democratic senators for trying to stop his Muslim ban.

If there's one thing I've learned working for Elizabeth Warren, we cannot let an attack like this go unanswered. When Trump comes after our team, we must fight back (even if Team Trump doesn't seem to know Kirsten Gillibrand's actual first name).

Senators like Bernie Sanders, Tammy Baldwin, Chris Murphy -- and so many others taking a stand -- need to see all the support they have from folks like us.

**[Chip in $1 right now.](https://secure.dscc. Thank you,

Mindy Myers
DSCC Executive Director

\--------FORWARDED MESSAGE--------

From: DonaldJTrump.com
Date: Wed, Mar 8, 2017
Subject: BREAKING: Bernie Sanders, Tammy Baldwin and 14 others

[](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-stop-trump?refcode=DPE-20170309-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

16 liberal senators introduced a bill last night seeking to stop President Trump's Executive Order on immigration and make America less safe.

We need 28O,OOO more American citizens to show their support for the President's critical national security measure. And as one of his top supporters, we're turning to you first, friend.

Stand up today to tell these 16 out-of-touch Democrats that the American people are behind President Trump's agenda to Make America Safe Again!

**[Sign our Petition>> Tell Democrats to stop trying to BLOCK President Trump's Executive Order on immigration.](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-stop-trump?refcode=DPE-20170309-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

This is your chance to tell Tammy Baldwin, Bernie Sanders, Cory Booker, Kristen Gillibrand, and the other radical liberals behind the bill that the American citizens want policies in place that protect our borders and keep America SAFE.

Be one of the great American citizens who stepped up in support of our country's security.

**[Sign our Petition now.>>](https://secure.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dscc-stop-trump?refcode=DPE-20170309-Myers-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**

Thanks,
Team TRUMP

120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,

Hello,
Washington Republicans' plan to repeal the Affordable Care Act and defund Planned Parenthood is even worse than we anticipated.
First, it would prevent millions of women and men from accessing reproductive health care and cancer screenings. But it doesn't stop there.
It would also end Medicaid expansion, our best tool for combating the substance abuse crisis. And it would disproportionately drive up health care costs for older Americans and Granite Staters -- all so insurance companies can pad their bottom lines and reward their CEOs with tax breaks.
We just pulled the data -- it looks like you haven't yet signed our petition opposing this plan. [**Washington Republicans are going to try to ram this bill through as quickly as they can, so please add your name immediately to say that you oppose repealing the Affordable Care Act and defunding Planned Parenthood.**](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fdd17/2a380d31/15ec3f17/feeb56/723323205/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/s/20170204_ACA-petition?source=e20170309_ACApetition2_all&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")

body:
Friend, we wanted to make sure you saw this important message from Chris. "We need to band together to defeat this bill and protect health care in America." [**Please sign now >>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b0f/70cdc2ba/474ce8dc/397e21a/167344735/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-stop-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Please+sign+nowgtgtgt&utm_campaign=em030917&source=em030917")

-Team Van Hollen

_ Begin forwarded message:_
> | __
> Friend,
>
> News and developments have been moving fast. On Monday, we saw the President's dangerous "new" travel ban which plays into the hands of our enemies, and then yesterday the Republicans finally released their new plan to "repeal and replace" the Affordable Care Act. Now we know why they wanted to keep the plan secret for so long -- it would be a disaster for health care in America.
>
> The plan gives a windfall tax break to the wealthiest and an outrageous tax break for the multi -million dollar bonuses that insurance companies pay their CEOs. And it's no surprise who gets the short end of the stick -- the tens of millions of Americans who will either lose their insurance or will have to pay a lot more for a lot less coverage. Among other things, it will totally phase-out Medicaid extension, defund Planned Parenthood, and strip away many of the protections against discrimination based on pre-existing conditions.
>
> Republicans want to ram this bill through Congress before Americans can react to it and before we have the official budget estimates that will show how much it will cost taxpayers. We need to say no!
>
> [**Please join with me by signing your name to reject Trumpcare and its disastrous consequences. Let's make our voices heard now before Republicans in Washington take their next steps to wreck the Affordable Care Act.**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b0f/70cdc2ba/474ce8dc/397e21b/167344735/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-stop-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+join+with+me+by+signing+your+name&utm_campaign=em030917&source=em030917")
>
>

> The architects of this plan like to say it will 'expand freedom', but in reality it provides a giant tax cut for the wealthiest in our country, while stripping everyday Americans of access to mental healthcare, reproductive services, opioid addiction treatments and affordable coverage. [**We must band together now to defeat this bill and to protect health care in America!**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91b0f/70cdc2ba/474ce8dc/397e219/167344735/VEsC/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/sign-stop-trumpcare?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=4+-+We+must+band+together+now+to+defeat+this&utm_campaign=em030917&source=em030917")

> I will be doing everything I can to stop this destructive plan.

> Thank you for taking action.
>
> Chris

"" -Team Van Hollen Begin forwarded message: | Friend, News and developments have been moving fast. On Monday, we saw the President's dangerous "new" travel ban which plays into the hands of our enemies, and then yesterday the Republicans finally released their new plan to "repeal and replace" the Affordable Care Act. Now we know why they wanted to keep the plan secret for so long -- it would be a disaster for health care in America. The plan gives a windfall tax break to the wealthiest and an outrageous tax break for the multi -million dollar bonuses that insurance companies pay their CEOs. And it's no surprise who gets the short end of the stick -- the tens of millions of Americans who will either lose their insurance or will have to pay a lot more for a lot less coverage. Among other things, it will totally phase-out Medicaid extension, defund Planned Parenthood, and strip away many of the protections against discrimination based on pre-existing conditions. Republicans want to ram this bill through Congress before Americans can react to it and before we have the official budget estimates that will show how much it will cost taxpayers. We need to say no! "" "" The architects of this plan like to say it will 'expand freedom', but in reality it provides a giant tax cut for the wealthiest in our country, while stripping everyday Americans of access to mental healthcare, reproductive services, opioid addiction treatments and affordable coverage. "" I will be doing everything I can to stop this destructive plan. Thank you for taking action. Chris --- Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate "" We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Join me NOW in the fight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by PEM PAC | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e2f/738133e4/3301934b/7f85aa51/772237491/VEsH/ "https://www.murphyforflorida.com")
---
| Friends, It's been less than two months since Donald Trump took office, but you don't need me to tell you how bad things have gotten. Conspiracy theories about wiretapping. Administration officials lying about Russia. An unconstitutional immigration ban. Healthcare on the verge of repeal.

What's worse? **44%. **That's President Trump's approval rating in the daily Gallup tracker. He got 46% on Election Day to win the White House, yet despite all the scandal, turmoil, lying, protests, and outrage since then, _he's lost only 2% of the support he needed to win!_

**That means Trump could continue implementing his reckless agenda, and Republicans may never suffer at the voting booth for it.

[ That's why I am re-launching my leadership PAC today to support Democrats who will fight back against Trump, and I need your help to get it started.](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e2f/738133e4/3301934b/7f85aa52/772237491/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pm170309?refcode=link1")**

After my first election, I formed "PEM" PAC (those are my initials, if you're wondering) to financially support forward-thinking Democrats who share a dedication to our values of freedom of the press, access to the ballot, access to affordable healthcare, and compassionate immigration reform.

**In unprecedented times, these principles have become reflections of who we want to be as a nation. But they are under daily attack by President Trump.**

I don't know what _my_ political future holds just yet. But with control of the House and Senate at stake next year, Washington needs more Democrats willing to stand up for everything we believe in and everything we accomplished under President Obama. **[Chip in $5 now >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e2f/738133e4/3301934b/7f85aa53/772237491/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pm170309?refcode=nox5&amount=5.00")** **[Chip in $10 now >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e2f/738133e4/3301934b/7f85aa4c/772237491/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pm170309?refcode=nox10&amount=10.00")** **[Chip in $25 now >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e2f/738133e4/3301934b/7f85aa4d/772237491/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pm170309?refcode=nox25&amount=25.00")** **[Chip in $50 now >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e2f/738133e4/3301934b/7f85aa4e/772237491/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pm170309?refcode=nox50&amount=50.00")** **[Or, chip in another amount >>](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e2f/738133e4/3301934b/7f85aa4f/772237491/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pm170309?refcode=noxother")** Since it's been active, PEM PAC has supported over 30 Democratic elected officials and candidates for office who share our ideals. And with the 2018 midterms just getting started, I'll be contributing in every way I can -- **with my money, my time, and my voice**. [**_Please join me in this fight._**](https://secure.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2e2f/738133e4/3301934b/7f85aa48/772237491/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pm170309?refcode=link2")

Thank you, and I look forward to updating you on our progress soon.

\-- Patrick |

body:

**_Hardworking Hoosiers_** This week was a great reminder of how hard our responsible Republican leaders work to better the lives of Hoosiers and Americans. From the confirmations of Dan Coats and Seema Verma advancing to their final votes to Jackie Walorski, Susan Brooks and Larry Bucshon enduring marathon committee markup hearings, we're a lucky bunch to have them representing us and fighting for us every day.

\- Kyle
(Photo: Chairman Hupfer with newly elected Marion County Chair Senator Jim Merritt at the Warren Township Lincoln Day Dinner)
---
|
---
| | _**Governor Holcomb's Week That Was**_
---
| [ ](http://)
---
|

---
| This week, Governor Holcomb blitzed the state yet again, visiting[ Elkhart](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=8fbb1d9b75&e=1acd9bb3d6), [South Bend](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=58054a79d0&e=1acd9bb3d6), [Hanover](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=90cf5a67b4&e=1acd9bb3d6), Lafayette, Terre Haute and Lawrenceburg. AND he welcomed members of the [Southwest Indiana Chamber of Commerce](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=4b870d7f35&e=1acd9bb3d6), the [Power Caucus](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=7c6318ddcf&e=1acd9bb3d6), the Elkhart County Republican Party - and many, many more groups and individuals - to the Governor's Office. Whew!

|

| Congresswomanman Jackie Walorski (seen on the right side of the first photo), Congresswoman Susan Brooks and Congressman Larry Bucshon (both seen on the left of the second photo) endured marathon mark-up hearings on the American Health Care Act this week. Walorski's Ways & Means Committee met for 18 hours while the Energy & Commerce Committee, which Brooks and Bucshon are members of, held a 27-hour meeting. Unlike Obamacare, you can read the American Health Care Act for yourself __**before**__ it's passed. Visit [www.readthebill.gop](http://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=3dcc52c4d2&e=1acd9bb3d6) for more information.

| **The New Hampshire Senate
REPUBLICAN MAJORITY OFFICE**
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:** March 7, 2017
**Birdsell touts benefits of updated voter domicile definition, protections for NH voters, turning no voters away**
CONCORD – Today, Senator Regina Birdsell (R-Hampstead) introduced a bill in the Election Law and Internal Affairs Committee which will clarify the domicile requirement for voting purposes in New Hampshire. Senator Birdsell released the following statement:
“This is a common sense piece of legislation that clarifies what it means to be domiciled in New Hampshire” said Senator Regina Birdsell (R-Hampstead). “Making changes to the currently confusing and unclear voter domicile laws have had wide support by New Hampshire voters and Secretary of State Bill Gardner.”
“By passing this bill, the Senate will finally clarify that domicile is more than just a state of mind by requiring proof after voting if they are unable to do so on election day. This will ensure that only those with a vested interest in New Hampshire’s communities to vote in an election. At the same time, we will be protecting the integrity of our elections and allowing only those with a vested interest in New Hampshire’s communities to vote in an election.”
###

clean_body: | | | NEW HAMPSHIRE REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, MARCH 10th | ---|---|--- | | A Note From Jeanie | | | Dear Friends, It’s hard to believe it has been six weeks since I was elected Chair of the NHGOP. Time flies when there is a lot to do—and there is a LOT to do! We’ve got several coming up, fundraising and grassroots events in the planning stages, and new programs we are in the process of starting up. Whether it’s the iGOP Intern Program, the Veterans’ Outreach Program, or our Diversity Outreach Program there is overwhelming excitement and a renewed spirit of enthusiasm. Here at 10 Water Street, we are actively promoting Republican Legislative priorities, working with the press and taking the fight to the and . Please see below for some of our recent releases, tweets, and posts. We’re working on a that will include events hosted by the NHGOP, Republican Committees, and other activities that may be of interest to you. Help us out by . Mark your calendar now for next year’s annual meeting on Saturday, January 27th, 2018. I look forward to working together to not only maintain our majorities in the House, Senate, and Executive Council—but also growing those majorities. When 2018 rolls around (and it is just around the corner), we will see Governor Sununu sworn in for his second term and we will send two Republican Congressmen/women to Washington, D.C.—I know we can do it by focusing on our common priorities and working together. The NHGOP is here to be a resource, so please call us at 603-225-9341 if you have a question, an idea, or would like to help. Sincerely, Jeanie | | | Join the Grassroots Circle! | | The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. | | | | Intern with the NH GOP! | | Are you a student or know a student that is interested in Politics? Learn the skills necessary to win elections and meet the Republican leaders that govern our State and write legislation. | | | Upcoming Events | ---|---|--- | Merrimack County GOP Monthly Meeting March 15 - 6:00 PM | Special Guest: Charlie Arlinghaus The Draft, 67 N Main St., Concord, NH Coos County GOP Monthly Meeting March 16 - 7:00P PM Great North Woods Welcome Center, 25 Park St., Lancaster, NH Nashua GOP Roast of Jennifer Horn March 30 - 6:30 PM Marriott Event Center, 2200 Southward Drive, Nashua, NH For more information | | | | | | Photo of the Week | ---|---|--- Governor Chris Sununu with 5th graders from Manchester at Tuesday's NH Youth Summit on Opioid Awareness. LIKE Governor Sununu on Facebook! - | Legislative Highlights | ---|---|--- | The New Hampshire Senate REPUBLICAN MAJORITY OFFICE FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: March 7, 2017 Birdsell touts benefits of updated voter domicile definition, protections for NH voters, turning no voters away CONCORD – Today, Senator Regina Birdsell (R-Hampstead) introduced a bill in the Election Law and Internal Affairs Committee which will clarify the domicile requirement for voting purposes in New Hampshire. Senator Birdsell released the following statement: “This is a common sense piece of legislation that clarifies what it means to be domiciled in New Hampshire” said Senator Regina Birdsell (R-Hampstead). “Making changes to the currently confusing and unclear voter domicile laws have had wide support by New Hampshire voters and Secretary of State Bill Gardner.” “By passing this bill, the Senate will finally clarify that domicile is more than just a state of mind by requiring proof after voting if they are unable to do so on election day. This will ensure that only those with a vested interest in New Hampshire’s communities to vote in an election.
